requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SASO / SABER + IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（SASO / SABER + IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（SASO / SABER + IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances (refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezer combinations, wine coolers, ice-cream appliances) placed on the Saudi market must comply with the SASO-adopted electrical safety standard IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read in conjunction with the general standard IEC 60335-1. Compliance is demonstrated through the SABER platform: the Saudi importer obtains a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-approved conformity assessment body, supported by test reports to IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1, and then a per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC). Key requirements cover: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; thermal cut-outs; creepage and clearance distances; mechanical strength of housing; earthing continuity; and appliance markings. Appliances must be rated and tested for the Saudi supply of 230/400 V, 60 Hz. There is no manufacturer self-declaration route; the PCoC/SCoC are issued to the Saudi importer.
summary.zh: 投放沙特市场的家用制冷器具（电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒柜、冰淇淋器具）须符合SASO采用的电气安全标准IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用。合规通过SABER平台证明：沙特进口商凭IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1的检测报告，向SASO批准的合格评定机构取得产品符合性证书（PCoC），再取得每批货物的货物符合性证书（SCoC）。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；热断路器；爬电距离与电气间隙；外壳机械强度；接地连续性；及器具标识。器具须按沙特供电230/400 V、60 Hz进行标定和测试。不存在制造商自我声明路径；PCoC/SCoC签发给沙特进口商。
summary.zht: 投放沙特市場的家用製冷器具（電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒櫃、冰淇淋器具）須符合SASO採用的電氣安全標準IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用。合規通過SABER平台證明：沙特進口商憑IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1的檢測報告，向SASO批准的合格評定機構取得產品符合性證書（PCoC），再取得每批貨物的貨物符合性證書（SCoC）。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；熱斷路器；爬電距離與電氣間隙；外殼機械強度；接地連續性；及器具標識。器具須按沙特供電230/400 V、60 Hz進行標定和測試。不存在製造商自我聲明路徑；PCoC/SCoC簽發給沙特進口商。

standards_or_laws: SASO / SABER conformity-assessment regime — electrical safety for regulated household appliances
IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted via SASO)
IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) + per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) via SABER
Saudi grid: 230/400 V, 60 Hz — appliance rating and test configuration basis

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), which is technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporates Chinese national deviations. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime. Products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are NOT directly accepted as the basis for a Saudi Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) under the SASO/SABER regime.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），该标准技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中国国家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行。产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告，不被直接接受作为SASO/SABER制度下沙特产品符合性证书（PCoC）的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），該標準技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中國國家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行。產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告，不被直接接受作為SASO/SABER制度下沙特產品符合性證書（PCoC）的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both GB 4706.13 and the SASO-adopted standard derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the technical baseline is close, but procedural and configuration gaps remain: (1) Conformity-assessment route — Saudi market access requires a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-approved conformity assessment body plus a per-shipment SCoC via SABER, held by the Saudi importer; there is no self-declaration route as in some other markets. Test reports must be SASO-accepted — commonly an IECEE CB Scheme report and CB certificate (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) covering Saudi/GCC deviations, or ILAC MRA-accredited reports; CNAS-only GB reports are not directly accepted. (2) Supply configuration — appliances must be rated and tested for 230/400 V, 60 Hz Saudi supply; Chinese data generated only under 220/380 V (and especially under 50 Hz) configurations may require re-assessment. (3) Markings and documentation — appliance markings and user documentation in Arabic and the SEEC label are needed for retail. National/GCC deviations mean Chinese CCC test data cannot be assumed to cover the SASO-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 requirements without engineering review.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4706.13和SASO采用的标准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术基线接近，但仍存在程序及配置差距：（1）合格评定路径——进入沙特市场须由沙特进口商持有、向SASO批准的合格评定机构取得产品符合性证书（PCoC），并通过SABER取得每批货物的SCoC；不存在某些其他市场的自我声明路径。检测报告须为SASO接受——通常为涵盖沙特/GCC偏差的IECEE CB体系报告及CB证书（基于IEC 60335-2-24），或ILAC MRA认可的报告；仅有CNAS的GB报告不被直接接受。（2）供电配置——器具须按沙特供电230/400 V、60 Hz标定和测试；仅在220/380 V（尤其50 Hz）配置下生成的中国数据可能须重新评估。（3）标识与文件——零售须有阿拉伯文器具标识、用户文件及SEEC标签。国家/GCC偏差意味着中国CCC检测数据不能在未经工程评审的情况下默认涵盖SASO采用的IEC 60335-2-24要求。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4706.13和SASO採用的標準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術基線接近，但仍存在程序及配置差距：（1）合格評定路徑——進入沙特市場須由沙特進口商持有、向SASO批准的合格評定機構取得產品符合性證書（PCoC），並通過SABER取得每批貨物的SCoC；不存在某些其他市場的自我聲明路徑。檢測報告須為SASO接受——通常為涵蓋沙特/GCC偏差的IECEE CB體系報告及CB證書（基於IEC 60335-2-24），或ILAC MRA認可的報告；僅有CNAS的GB報告不被直接接受。（2）供電配置——器具須按沙特供電230/400 V、60 Hz標定和測試；僅在220/380 V（尤其50 Hz）配置下生成的中國數據可能須重新評估。（3）標識與文件——零售須有阿拉伯文器具標識、用戶文件及SEEC標籤。國家/GCC偏差意味著中國CCC檢測數據不能在未經工程評審的情況下默認涵蓋SASO採用的IEC 60335-2-24要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) based on IEC 60335-2-24 (with IEC 60335-1) plus a per-shipment SCoC via SABER are required before customs clearance; appliances must be rated for 230/400 V, 60 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: SABER platform / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to SASO-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 (with IEC 60335-1) is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances and is assessed through the SABER PCoC/SCoC process held by a Saudi importer. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not satisfy the SASO/SABER pathway; SASO-accepted test reports (commonly IECEE CB Scheme covering Saudi/GCC deviations, or ILAC MRA) and 230/400 V 60 Hz ratings are required. IECEE CB Scheme reports may reduce re-testing scope — verify with a SASO-approved conformity assessment body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据SASO采用的IEC 60335-2-24（配合IEC 60335-1）的电气安全合规是家用制冷器具的强制要求，并通过由沙特进口商持有的SABER PCoC/SCoC流程评定。中国依据GB 4706.13取得的CCC认证不满足SASO/SABER路径；须提供SASO接受的检测报告（通常为涵盖沙特/GCC偏差的IECEE CB体系，或ILAC MRA）及230/400 V 60 Hz标定。IECEE CB体系报告或可缩减重新检测范围——请与SASO批准的合格评定机构核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據SASO採用的IEC 60335-2-24（配合IEC 60335-1）的電氣安全合規是家用製冷器具的強制要求，並通過由沙特進口商持有的SABER PCoC/SCoC流程評定。中國依據GB 4706.13取得的CCC認證不滿足SASO/SABER路徑；須提供SASO接受的檢測報告（通常為涵蓋沙特/GCC偏差的IECEE CB體系，或ILAC MRA）及230/400 V 60 Hz標定。IECEE CB體系報告或可縮減重新檢測範圍——請與SASO批准的合格評定機構核實。
